_comment: Soul Refining Sect (炼魂宗) — headquartered in Pilu Kingdom (CANON_RI_COMPLETE_WORLD.md L296, F04). Dun Tian's sect; Wang Lin inherited the Ten Billion Soul Banner here (N18). Stand-in: desert village (Pilu is arid badlands). Final: soul-refining altars, soul banner vaults, mass graveyards, defensive grand array. Wang Lin's inheritance grounds.
